WITH cust_tot AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID=c.CustomerID
  WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '20130101' AND '20131231'
  GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_tot AS (
  SELECT Segment, MIN(total) AS min_total
  FROM cust_tot
  GROUP BY Segment
),
min_customers AS (
  SELECT ct.CustomerID, ct.Segment, ct.total
  FROM cust_tot ct
  JOIN min_tot mt ON ct.Segment=mt.Segment AND ct.total=mt.min_total
),
avg_min AS (
  SELECT Segment, AVG(total) AS avg_min
  FROM min_customers
  GROUP BY Segment
),
diff AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_min FROM avg_min WHERE Segment='SME') -
    (SELECT avg_min FROM avg_min WHERE Segment='LAM') AS SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_min FROM avg_min WHERE Segment='LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_min FROM avg_min WHERE Segment='KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_min FROM avg_min WHERE Segment='KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_min FROM avg_min WHERE Segment='SME') AS KAM_SME
)
SELECT * FROM diff;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
